# PHIL.107 ? Bias Toward Action

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** decision_making
**Subcategory:** bias_toward_action
**Domain:** DECISION_MAKING
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Default to doing rather than deliberating when uncertainty is high

## Application
Start before feeling ready, learn through action, iterate quickly, avoid analysis paralysis

philosophy, decision-making, bias-toward-action
